relations.note: Tinting/colorway rule refines the campaign headline typography treatment.
Lockup copy accompanies the headline treatment in the same hero placement.

quotes: Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.

rules.intent: Preserve the locked campaign headline treatment.
rules.rule_text: The "YOU DESERVE MORE" campaign headline is set in Agenda (campaign_headline.font = Agenda); digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only, with an email fallback of Nunito Sans ExtraBold (weight.nunito_sans.extrabold). It is ALL CAPS, always (case.campaign_headline.all_caps). In hero placements it stacks as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE), left-aligned (alignment.campaign_headline.left = left).

quotes: The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color
Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).
The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.
Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).

rules.intent: Encode the dermatomyositis 'd'/'m' tinting device and approved colorways.
rules.rule_text: In the "YOU DESERVE MORE" campaign headline, the letters "D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint (opacity.headline.letter_tint_40 = 0.4) of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis. Two approved colorways are permitted: brand Gold/Sunshine (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) or Brand Blue (#00529b), with the tinted letters at 40% of the same hue.

effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: **YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.
Full lockup copy: "**YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

rules.intent: Lock the approved campaign lockup / claim wording.
rules.rule_text: The full campaign lockup copy must read verbatim: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis." (brand name LISRAYA set all caps).
